changes.value:
## What
Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/index.rs` â€” the `SearchIndex` struct that owns documents + embeddings and provides the unified `search()` method with automatic strategy selection.

Implementation:
- `SearchIndex` holds: `Vec<Document>`, `HashMap<String, Vec<f32>>` (embeddings), `SkimMatcherV2`
- `add()`, `remove()`, `update()` â€” manage document collection, clear embedding on update
- `build_embeddings(&mut self, embedder)` â€” compute embeddings for docs missing them
- `search(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>`:
  - Short query (â‰¤3 words): fuzzy search only
  - Long query (>3 words): semantic search (requires embeddings built)
  - Fallback: if fuzzy returns 0 results and embeddings exist, try semantic
- `search_semantic(query, embedder, limit)` â€” force semantic path (embeds query on the fly)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `search()` with short query uses fuzzy strategy
- [ ] `search()` with long query uses semantic strategy (when embeddings available)
- [ ] `search()` falls back to semantic when fuzzy returns no results
- [ ] `search()` gracefully degrades to fuzzy-only when no embeddings built
- [ ] `add/remove/update` maintain index consistency

## Tests
- [ ] `test_search_short_query_uses_fuzzy` â€” verify strategy is Fuzzy for short queries
- [ ] `test_search_fallback_to_semantic` â€” fuzzy misses, semantic finds
- [ ] `test_search_no_embeddings_fuzzy_only` â€” degrades gracefully
- [ ] `test_index_add_remove_update` â€” CRUD operations work
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search index`
Implement SearchIndex with hybrid fuzzyâ†’semantic fallback

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,26 +1,26 @@
 ## What
-Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/index.rs` â€” the `SearchIndex` struct that owns documents + embeddings and provides the unified `search()` method with automatic strategy selection.
+Create `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/index.rs` â€” the `EntitySearchIndex` struct that owns indexed entities + embeddings and provides unified `search()` with automatic strategy selection.

 Implementation:
-- `SearchIndex` holds: `Vec<Document>`, `HashMap<String, Vec<f32>>` (embeddings), `SkimMatcherV2`
-- `add()`, `remove()`, `update()` â€” manage document collection, clear embedding on update
-- `build_embeddings(&mut self, embedder)` â€” compute embeddings for docs missing them
+- `EntitySearchIndex` holds: `Vec<Entity>` (or refs), `HashMap<EntityId, Vec<f32>>` embeddings, `SkimMatcherV2`
+- `add(entity)`, `remove(id)`, `update(entity)` â€” manage entity collection, invalidate embedding on update
+- `build_embeddings(&mut self, embedder)` â€” compute embeddings for entities missing them
 - `search(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>`:
-  - Short query (â‰¤3 words): fuzzy search only
-  - Long query (>3 words): semantic search (requires embeddings built)
+  - Short query (â‰¤3 words): fuzzy only
+  - Long query (>3 words): semantic (if embeddings available)
   - Fallback: if fuzzy returns 0 results and embeddings exist, try semantic
-- `search_semantic(query, embedder, limit)` â€” force semantic path (embeds query on the fly)
+- `search_semantic(query, embedder, limit)` â€” force semantic path

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] `search()` with short query uses fuzzy strategy
-- [ ] `search()` with long query uses semantic strategy (when embeddings available)
+- [ ] `search()` with long query uses semantic strategy when embeddings available
 - [ ] `search()` falls back to semantic when fuzzy returns no results
-- [ ] `search()` gracefully degrades to fuzzy-only when no embeddings built
+- [ ] Gracefully degrades to fuzzy-only when no embeddings built
 - [ ] `add/remove/update` maintain index consistency

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `test_search_short_query_uses_fuzzy` â€” verify strategy is Fuzzy for short queries
-- [ ] `test_search_fallback_to_semantic` â€” fuzzy misses, semantic finds
-- [ ] `test_search_no_embeddings_fuzzy_only` â€” degrades gracefully
-- [ ] `test_index_add_remove_update` â€” CRUD operations work
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search index`
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `test_search_short_query_uses_fuzzy`
+- [ ] `test_search_fallback_to_semantic`
+- [ ] `test_search_no_embeddings_fuzzy_only`
+- [ ] `test_index_crud`
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search index`
\ No newline at end of file

-  - Short query (â‰¤3 words): fuzzy only

+  - Long query (>3 words): semantic search (requires embeddings built)
   - Fallback: if fuzzy returns 0 results and embeddings exist, try semantic
-- `search_semantic(query, embedder, limit)` â€” force semantic path

-- [ ] `search()` with long query uses semantic strategy when embeddings available
